view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a temporary booking page that expires after the meeting is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a temporary booking page that expires after the meeting is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the system generates a temporary link for a one-off meeting, which automatically expires after the meeting completes. This is evidenced by the scenario described in the linked use case, where a temporary link is generated (biz.ing/abc123-expires-24h) and is set to expire after the meeting. Additionally, the booking details confirm that the meeting is scheduled and the link's expiration behavior aligns with the requirement.
